description: Execute V0.8-M4: Implement the bin/agent-protocol-review daemon that detects _review_pending states, reads the registry capabilities, orchestrates an isolated SubAgent (e.g. opencode run), and advances the state machine based on the returned decision.json.
scope: 1. Create bin/agent-protocol-review to read .agent-state/workflow/dispatch.json and iteration-state.json. 2. Implement logic that checks if current_gate is *_review_pending. 3. Create a detached child_process wrapper to execute the review (mocked LLM call via terminal, representing opencode run if the registry specifies it). 4. If the decision is Approved, advance current_gate to *_execution_ready or *_completed.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of the Team Mode Cloud Sync logic (M5). NO removal of legacy Python tooling (M6). NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside of standard M4 progression.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to write logic that bypasses the independent SubAgent process.
Executing without an approved M4 contract.
